title: strychnos tricalysioides
intro: Strychnos tricalysioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Strychnos tricalysioides include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Strychnos tricalysioides is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be made into a poultice or ointment for external application.
